name: @lgdd/d-scribe
description: AI-first CLI toolkit for assembling Datadog demo projects

scripts.postbuild: rm -rf dist/catalog dist/skills dist/templates; [ -d ../catalog ] && cp -r ../catalog dist/catalog || true; [ -d ../skills ] && cp -r ../skills dist/skills || true; [ -d src/templates ] && cp -r src/templates dist/templates || true
